name: Chiii Corn Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 ounces) whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together 1 cup of the chicken broth and egg until blended.
Add the stuffing ingredients; toss to mix well.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate. Reserve 1/2 cup of the stuffing mixture; press
the remaining stuffing mixture on the bottom and side of the plate to form
the crust.
3. To prepare the filling:
- In a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, brown the ground beef and cook
the onion with garlic, stirring to separate the meat. Spoon off any fat.
- Add chili powder; cook for 5 minutes more.
- Stir in the remaining chicken broth, corn, and Worcestershire sauce.
Heat until boiling. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove from heat.
4. Stir the cheese and reserved stuffing mixture into the beef mixture.
Spoon into the prepared pie plate. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes
or until hot. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving. Serve with sour cream
and salsa.
Makes 8 servings.
